parameters.content:
## [Quote] Roofing Bot v1.0.0

Standalone AI roofing quote bot for **Apex Roofing** (demo client, slug `demo-roofing`). Customer gives an address → bot calls `analyze_roof` (satellite imagery + Claude Vision) → bot computes an itemized quote using the pricing sheet.

**Pricing sheet:** "Apex Roofing Pricing" — tab `Quote-Pricing` (https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1S5J_lxEGt-raDqCNRxM9icwhaGbiGlvTBOHAptcHpfM/edit)

**Pricing model built from professional roofing-industry conventions (not real Apex numbers — demo placeholders):** material tiers (3-tab/architectural/metal per square), pitch-based area multiplier (sqrt(1+(rise/run)^2)), waste/complexity factor by facet count, steep-slope labor surcharge, tear-off + disposal, permit fee, per-feature surcharges (skylight/chimney/dormer), minimum job price, mileage-based travel zones from Apex's base address.

**Credentials:** `Anthropic API`, `Caiac Group Sheets`.
**Calls:** `[Quote] Analyze Roof v1.0.0` (satellite + vision sub-workflow).

parameters.initialMessages: Hi! I'm the Apex Roofing Quote Assistant. Give me your property address and I'll pull up a satellite view of your roof to build you an instant estimate — no need to wait for an on-site visit to get a ballpark number.

parameters.name: analyze_roof
parameters.description:
Analyzes a property's roof using satellite imagery and AI vision. Call this once you have the customer's full property address. Returns roof measurements (footprint_sqft, pitch_estimate, pitch_ratio, total_roof_sqft, facet_count, complexity, material_squares_needed, tear_off_squares, skylights, chimneys, dormers) plus travel_zone_label and travel_fee for that address.

Parameters:
- customer_address (string): the full property address (street, city, state, zip)
